---
id: userland-users-controller-get-password-reset
title: "Get a password reset token"
description: "Get the details of an existing password reset token that can be used to reset a user's password."
sidebar_label: "Get a password reset token"
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api:

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Get a password reset token"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"get"}
  path={"/user_management/password_reset/{id}"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Get the details of an existing password reset token that can be used to reset a user's password.
